Given that this is a utility factory with no external data processing or network calls, these scores are appropriate.\n\n### Additional Observations:\n- The base64 string in the source map is a standard artifact for source maps and not malicious.\n- The code does not handle untrusted data inputs directly; it merely creates interfaces and connects to known contract addresses.\n- No signs of dynamic code execution, backdoors, or data exfiltration.\n\n---\n\n### **Final Assessment:**\n\n**Malware Score:** 0  \n**Obfuscated Score:** 0  \n**Risk Score:** 0.1 (consistent with the reports and the nature of the code)\n\nThis code is a benign, autogenerated utility for interacting with a specific smart contract.
